macro.title: VantageScore 5.0 launches as new tri-bureau credit score
macro.what: VantageScore 5.0 launches as a tri-bureau model using post-2020 data, claiming up to 9% better prediction and steadier scores.
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: Optimal Blue sees June mortgage lock volume up 10%
macro.what: Optimal Blue says June rate-lock volume rose 10% from May and 15% year over year, with purchase locks at 81% and rates near 6.45%.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: U.S. Pending Home Sales Rise to Highest Level in 6 Weeks
macro.what: Pending home sales ticked up as housing payments temporarily dipped down
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: WNC closes $210M LIHTC funding for 2,000-plus affordable units
housing.what: WNC & Associates closed a $210 million national Low-Income Housing Tax Credit fund that will finance 2,015 affordable units in 18 communities across 13 states.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: New Zillow Pro tells agents when their contacts start house hunting again
housing.what: Zillow Pro gives agents real-time insight into client activity on Zillow, tying consumer behavior to CRM workflows in a flat transaction market.
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: The $32 Beazer bid is in, now the fight is over standstill terms
housing.what: A little more than a month into a hostile homebuilder takeover saga that has not quite reached midsummer, Dream Finders Homes’ pursuit of Beazer Homes is beginning to resemble a Shakespearean tale of unrequited love
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: NYC office conversions face scrutiny after Pfizer HQ incident
housing.what: Buckling columns at the former Pfizer headquarters this week forced evacuations across seven Midtown East blocks
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

housing.title: Synergy One to take over Newrez distributed retail mortgage operations
housing.what: Synergy One will assume Newrez’s distributed retail business, as Newrez doubles down on JVs and direct channels in a bid for long-term growth.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Visionary Homes names former Oakwood exec Ryan Smith CEO
housing.what: Visionary Homes, one of Utah’s largest privately held homebuilders, appointed Ryan Smith as CEO effective Sept
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: CFPB seeks input on mortgage disclosures and TRID rules
housing.what: CFPB issued an RFI on TRID, refinance rescission and reverse mortgage disclosures, asking if current rules raise costs and limit access.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: There Are Now Only 5 Major Metros Where A Typical Luxury Home Costs Less Than $1 Million
housing.what: The number of major metros where you can buy a luxury home for less than $1 million is down to five from eight last year
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Luxury Homes Cost 9 Times More Than the Typical Homes in These South Florida “Wealth Magnet” Metros
housing.what: West Palm Beach, FL, where the typical luxury home costs 8.9 times more than the typical non luxury home, has the nation’s biggest luxury home price premium
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

notables.title: How top-performing real estate agents win AI recommendations
notables.what: Homebuyers are using ChatGPT and other LLMs to choose agents
notables.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
notables.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
